programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: When you're young and single in the city, your friends are your family. A tight-knit group of friends living in Manhattan -- three girls and three guys -- navigate the complexities of adulthood and rely on the companionship, comfort and support they get from each other to deal with the pressures of life.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR O'Reilly Auto Parts Series

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph Kramden is a perpetually flustered but eternally optimistic New York City bus driver living with his wife, Alice, in a small Brooklyn apartment. Ralph's best friend is sanitation worker Ed Norton, who lives in the same building with wife Trixie.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Jack Hibbs
programme.desc: Real Life Ministry's Pastor Jack Hibbs proclaims Biblical truth impacting culture, with a clear understanding of God's word.

programme.title: The Key of David
programme.desc: Vision Television host Gerald Flurry presents a weekly analysis of world events. Through the perspective of biblical prophecy, Flurry delivers messages of warning, often about issues concerning the growing power and influence of the European Union. From the studios of the Philadelphia Church of God, "The Key of David" attempts to stand out among today's modern devotional programming. Its viewers have referred to the program as frank, bold and rational without an overt emotional sentimentality.

programme.title: The Hill Sunday With Chris Stirewalt
programme.desc: Featuring a variety of politicians and newsmakers discussing the latest political news from the nation's capital.

programme.title: Emma: Natural Relief for Bloating, Constipation & Gut Imbalance
programme.desc: Tired of bloating or gut issues that won't go away?; discovering the root cause-and how Emma can help eliminate methane-producing archaea, reset digestion and restore balance naturally.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the Set of 20 Truly Historic Morgan Silver Dollars in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection today. With only about 1% of all Morgan Dollars grading in uncirculated condition, examples like these are Condition Rarities.

programme.title: Live: PBA Bowling
programme.desc: This championship honors legendary bowlers Mark Roth and Marshall Holman, who were known for their success in doubles competitions. The 2026 edition takes place at Bayside Bowl in Portland, Maine, featuring a maximum of 32 teams.

programme.title: How to Build a Rock Solid Retirement
programme.desc: Learn the top 3 retirement mistakes people are making and how to fix them.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Starting a new job can be a difficult challenge, especially if you're already retired. Looking to get back into the game, 70-year-old widower Ben Whittaker (Robert De Niro) seizes the opportunity to become a senior intern at an online fashion site. Ben soon becomes popular with his younger co-workers, including Jules Ostin (Anne Hathaway), the boss and founder of the company. Whittaker's charm, wisdom and sense of humor help him develop a special bond and growing friendship with Jules.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.sub-title: Last Chance to See Those Tattoos

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: An ex-girlfriend admits to creating a fake dating profile to track her boyfriend in this lawsuit over personal property.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.sub-title: That's What Friends Are Not For
programme.desc: A dispute arises between a man and a cleaning company owner regarding a poorly executed deep clean of his house, prompting a demand for a refund; the owner, who was once friends with the client, argues that she went above and beyond to help him.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.sub-title: A Tragic Loss Leaves Unanswered Questions
programme.desc: Teen Nyasia helped to raise her little half-brother after her father was murdered, but questions have arisen as to whether he was really her father's child; Kayla's baby passed away while in a baby sitter's care, the cause of death undetermined.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Truth: Did I Find My Mom 2 Weeks Ago?
programme.desc: Lisa has spent 40 years searching for her biological daughter, Crystal, of whom she lost custody because of her youth and drug use; Crystal says their recent reconnection has been one-sided and dismissive of her feelings.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: Twin sisters accuse a retiree of assault after their rental agreement to board dogs falls apart; the defendant claims they hit him in the head with a 2x4.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.sub-title: Washed Up Friendship; Time to Pay the Toll
programme.desc: A woman asks a friend to buy and install a washer/dryer in her home but refuses to pay him despite her continued use of the appliances; a woman purchases a used car from a friend, she leaves hundreds of toll charges in her wake.
